contracts.retry_policy: idempotent command retry keyed by operation/run id; replay validates event and proof hashes
contracts.dlq_policy: invalid or blocked events remain in operation/evidence failure surfaces; failed_ops/open_approvals views expose remediation

contracts.producer: task packets, envctl command execution, artifact generators
contracts.retry_policy: idempotency_key plus command_hash prevents duplicate unsafe work
contracts.dlq_policy: failed operation status, error_ref, rollback handles, and validation evidence become the remediation queue

contracts.retry_policy: content hash recomputation and ON CONFLICT upserts keep artifact registration repeatable
contracts.dlq_policy: blocked paths, mismatched hashes, and foreign producer operations are rejected fail-closed

contracts.retry_policy: approval decision events are append-only and tied to operation id
contracts.dlq_policy: denied/expired/blocked approvals halt execution until the operator records a decision

contracts.producer: verification commands and artifact registry validators
contracts.retry_policy: validation commands are rerunnable and reference immutable evidence hashes
contracts.dlq_policy: fail/warn/blocked statuses carry next_action through proof and evidence records

records.name: Operation
records.plugin_shape: Nushell operation table row and detail record

records.name: ArtifactRecord
records.plugin_shape: Nushell artifact table row and detail record

nu_plugin_event_commands.name: envctl migration run start
nu_plugin_event_commands.description: Start an approved or approval-gated migration run from a plan.

nu_plugin_event_commands.name: envctl migration approve
nu_plugin_event_commands.description: Approve one pending operation or approval request and append an envctl event.

nu_plugin_event_commands.name: envctl migration pause
nu_plugin_event_commands.description: Pause a run through envctl and record the operator reason.

nu_plugin_event_commands.name: envctl migration resume
nu_plugin_event_commands.description: Resume a paused run through envctl after safety checks pass.

nu_plugin_event_commands.name: envctl migration replay
nu_plugin_event_commands.description: Replay a run from recorded target, recipe, event, and proof hashes without mutating target state.
